releaseNotes: Dashboard polish: "Your week so far" is now "This week" with proper Monday-to-today math against a full prior Monday-Sunday baseline. Each comparable stat shows "Last week: X" instead of a +/- delta so the comparison is unambiguous; Avg sleep + Avg quality color the line green when you're ahead and amber when you're behind. Empty-state cleanup — no more misleading "0m" or "on target" when there's nothing logged yet. Also: AI summary card retitled "Past 7 days — AI summary" to match the actual window.
